chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 2026 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.7502/2024 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 11.03.2025 Mr. Muhammad Yaseen Khaskheli, Advocate for Petitioners Agha Ather Hussain Pathan, Assistant AG Sindh Mr. Khalil Ahmed Metlo, Deputy PG for State >>>>>..<<<<< On the last date of hearing, Investigating Officer has recorded the statement of petitioner No.1 namely, Mst. Sumera Bibi. Learned counsel for the petitioners after going through said statement of petitioner No.1, being satisfied submits that this petition may be disposed of while directing the official respondents within the jurisdiction of this Court to provide protection to the petitioners. Order accordingly. Judge Judge ARBROHI
